data.body: CHECKPOINT 1/6: Task context loaded. Analysis: resolve-conflicts SKILL.md has pattern 2 but pattern 1 fails due to backtick formatting. end-session SKILL.md is missing both CRITICAL guard and 'do NOT use git merge -X ours'. Plan: (a) update evals.json pattern 1 for resolve-conflicts to match actual backtick-formatted text, (b) add safety guards to end-session SKILL.md.
